name: Chicken Florentine
recipeIngredient: 20 oz Spinach, frozen chopped; thawed and drained
6 Chicken breast halves; boned, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together spinach, rice, soup and 1/8 teaspoon of the black pepper.
2. Spread mixture in a greased 13 x 9-inch baking dish.
3. Layer chicken pieces on top of spinach.
4. Season with garlic powder and remaining black pepper.
5. Sprinkle cheese over chicken.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
